name: relay-codex
description: Keep Codex moving on your project without losing state.

interface.shortDescription: Monitor progress, detect drift, and keep work moving
interface.longDescription: Relay for Codex adds repo-local state, progress monitoring, recovery heuristics, and automation pack recommendations so heavy Codex users can keep a project moving without losing context.
defaultPrompt: Check whether Codex is stuck and what to do next
Install automations to keep this project moving
